Moving the avatar to the right to position myself near the edge of the central base cover, preparing to fire at any incoming aliens while remaining close to protection. Expecting the avatar to move from column 16 to 17.
Action:2 ``` Feedback:I am moving the avatar to the left to align with the alien at column 0, which is my primary target. I expect the avatar's position to change from (10, 16) to (10, 15). ```

Action:2
Moving left to align with the alien at column 0, while staying clear of the bases to avoid destroying my own cover when I eventually fire.

Action:2

Moving left to align with the aliens located at the top left of the screen (columns 0 and 1). My expectation is that the avatar will move from (10, 16) to (10, 15).

Action:2 

Moving left to align with the aliens located at the top-left of the screen (columns 0 and 1) while staying behind the protective cover of the bases. I expect the avatar to move from column 15 to column 14.

Moving the avatar to the left to align with the aliens at the top-left corner of the screen.

Action:2 

Feedback: Moving the avatar left from column 13 towards the aliens located at columns 1 and 2 to get into a firing position. Expecting the avatar to be at column 12 in the next state.

Action:2

Feedback:Moving the avatar left from column 12 towards columns 1 and 2 to align with the alienGreen enemies for a clear shot.

Feedback:Moving right to (10, 7) to eventually reach a clear shooting lane at column 8, avoiding my own bases while positioning to target the aliens.

Moving left to align with the alien at column 4. I expect the avatar to move from (10, 5) to (10, 4), positioning itself closer to the enemies while still being somewhat protected by the base structures.

Feedback:I am moving the avatar to the left to align with the alien at column 4, while staying under the protection of the base structures. Expecting to move from (10, 6) to (10, 5).

Moving left to align with the aliens on the left side of the screen, expecting to reach column 4.

Action:3
Feedback:I am moving the avatar to the right to get out from under the protective base and find a clear line of sight to fire at the aliens.
Expectation:The avatar's position will change from (10, 4) to (10, 5).

Action:2
Feedback:I am moving the avatar to the left to get a clear line of sight on the aliens at columns 1 and 2, as the current position is blocked by a base. Expecting to move to (10, 2).

Action:2 
Feedback:Moving the avatar left from (10, 4) to (10, 3) to eventually reach a position (like col 1 or 2) where I can target the aliens, while keeping an eye on the overhead bases. Expecting the avatar to be at (10, 3) in the next state.
